The Approach

Photography is the art of making silence visible

Every frame begins with a moment of stillness. I wait for the light to speak, for the composition to reveal itself.

Based in Munich, my work has been featured in Vogue, Monocle, and Wallpaper*. I collaborate with brands and individuals who seek to capture something timeless.

12+

Years

80+

Projects

15

Awards

About

Elena Voss

Born in Zurich and trained at the Berlin University of the Arts, I have spent over a decade exploring the intersection of light and emotion through my lens.

My work lives in the quiet spaces — the breath between heartbeats, the moment before dawn, the shadow that gives form to light. I believe the most powerful images are not seen but felt.

Munich, Germany

"Elena doesn't just take photographs — she captures the soul of a moment and preserves it forever. Her work transforms the ordinary into the extraordinary."

Isabelle Moreau

Editor-in-Chief, Monocle

Services

What I Offer

Editorial

High-fashion and editorial photography for magazines, campaigns, and brand storytelling.

Portrait

Intimate, character-driven portraits that reveal the essence of individuals and couples.

Fine Art

Limited edition prints and commissioned works for private collectors and galleries.

Get in Touch

Let's Create Together

Whether you have a project in mind or simply wish to say hello, I'd love to hear from you.
